evidence.clean_text: Pegasus spyware can be implanted on a device by various means including by the user of the device clicking on a link in a malicious text message formulated so as to provoke the user’s specific interest. Once implanted and installed on the device, the spyware works by causing the device to communicate with a command and control (C&C) server operated by a Pegasus customer (eg, the foreign state which purchased it) so as to receive commands from, and transmit data to, the customer.
